leadText: Cosmic Power (Japanese: コスモパワー Cosmo Power) is a non-damaging Psychic-type move introduced in Generation III. It was TR44 in Pokémon Sword and Shield.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Cosmic Power boosts the Defense and Special Defense of the user by one stage each. If powered up by a Psychium Z into Z-Cosmic Power, the user's Special Defense stat rises another stage.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E Colo XD Raises Defense and Sp. Def with a mystic power. FR LG The user absorbs a mystic power to raise its Defense and Sp. Def . D P Pt HG SS PBR B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user absorbs a mystical power from space to raise its Defense and Sp. Def stats. S V The user absorbs a mystical power from space to boost its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Boosts the user's Defense and Special Defense by one level. MD T D S Boosts the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 level. B S L じぶんの ぼうぎょ とくぼうを １だんかいあげる MD GtI UNUSED S MD It boosts your Defense and Sp. Def. The stats return to normal when you go to the next floor or step on a Wonder Tile.
